messages.content: 翻译为英文“A图为上调基因的GO,KEGG分析可视化的气泡图；B图为下调基因的GO,KEGG分析可视化的气泡图；C图为上调基因的富集术语的弦图；D图为下调基因的富集术语的弦图”

"The figure A shows the bubble chart for the upregulated genes in GO and KEGG analysis. The figure B shows the bubble chart for the downregulated genes in GO and KEGG analysis. The figure C shows the chord diagram for the enriched terms of upregulated genes. The figure D shows the chord diagram for the enriched terms of downregulated genes."
翻译：(A)是GSE119717数据集的上调差异表达基因的富集分析的气泡图（B)富集分析的弦图。（C)是将GSE47472和GSE57691数据集合并后差异表达基因的GSEA富集分析。

(A) is a bubble chart of the enriched analysis for upregulated differentially expressed genes in the GSE119717 dataset. (B) is a chord diagram for the enriched analysis. (C) shows a GSEA enrichment analysis of differentially expressed genes after merging the GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets.

改写(A) is a bubble chart of the enriched analysis for upregulated differentially expressed genes in the GSE119717 dataset. (B) is a chord diagram for the enriched analysis. © shows a GSEA enrichment analysis of differentially expressed genes after merging the GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets.

(A) displays a bubble chart illustrating the enrichment analysis of upregulated differentially expressed genes in the GSE119717 dataset. (B) presents a chord diagram for the same enriched analysis. © demonstrates a GSEA enrichment analysis for differentially expressed genes obtained by combining the GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets.

改写(A) displays a bubble chart illustrating the enrichment analysis of upregulated differentially expressed genes in the GSE119717 dataset. (B) presents a chord diagram for the same enriched analysis. © demonstrates a GSEA enrichment analysis for differentially expressed genes obtained by combining the GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets.

(A) exhibits a bubble chart that portrays the enriched analysis of differentially expressed genes, which are upregulated in the GSE119717 dataset. (B) illustrates the same enriched analysis through a chord diagram. © showcases a GSEA enrichment analysis of differentially expressed genes, resulting from the merger of the GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets.
翻译“差异排序图，是GSE47472和GSE57691数据集合并后，以|LogFC|>1 ， p<0.05作为阈值。图中横坐标代表logFC排序后的位置，纵坐标代表logFC，标记了排名前五和最后的五个基因”

"The volcano plot presents differential expression ranking of genes obtained by merging the GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets where a threshold of |LogFC|>1 and p<0.05 was applied. The horizontal axis indicates the rank position of the logFC, while the vertical axis represents the logFC. The top five and bottom five ranking genes are indicated."

翻译Testing of the model. ROC, DCA, and calibration curve were used to detect 10 hub genes. (A) ROC curves of the ferroptosis-related gene
signature that was a candidate for differential expression. (B) DCA of the candidate ferroptosis-related gene signature. (C) Calibration curve of
the model. DCA, decision curve analysis; ROC, receiver operating characteristic.

To test the model, ROC, DCA, and calibration curve analyses were performed to identify ten hub genes. (A) ROC curves were drawn for the differential expression of the candidate ferroptosis-related gene signature. (B) DCA was applied to assess the performance of the candidate gene signature. (C) A calibration curve was generated for the model. DCA stands for decision curve analysis, while ROC means receiver operating characteristic.

翻译为中文：Testing of the model. ROC, DCA, and calibration curve were used to detect 10 hub genes. (A) ROC curves of the ferroptosis-related gene
signature that was a candidate for differential expression. (B) DCA of the candidate ferroptosis-related gene signature. (C) Calibration curve of
the model. DCA, decision curve analysis; ROC, receiver operating characteristic.
对模型进行测试。使用ROC曲线、决策曲线分析(DCA)和校正曲线来检测10个关键基因。 (A)为差异表达的候选有关铁死亡的基因签名绘制了ROC曲线。(B) DCA评估了候选基因签名的性能。(C) 生成了该模型的校准曲线。DCA代表决策曲线分析，ROC代表接收器操作特征。
翻译：使用ROC曲线来检测所筛选的4个基因，ROC曲线下的面积（Area Under Curve，AUC）常用于诊断试验的评估, AUC取值范围一般在0.5和1之间, AUC越接近于1，说明该变量在预测结局上诊断效果越好。

The ROC curve was utilized to assess the four selected genes. The area under the ROC curve (AUC) is commonly used to evaluate diagnostic tests. The AUC ranges between 0.5 and 1, with a higher AUC indicating better diagnostic accuracy in predicting the outcome. The closer the AUC is to 1, the better the predictive performance of the variable on the outcome.

翻译Immune cell infiltration analysis of the early-stage experimental AAA models. The t-SNE plot for peri-adventitial elastase incubation induced
AAA scRNA-seq dataset (GSE152583) which contains elastase-induced AAA samples on day 7 and control aortas (A). The t-SNE plot for CaCl2
induced AAA scRNA-seq dataset (GSE164678) which contains CaCl2-induced AAA samples on day 4 and control aortas
早期实验性AAA模型的免疫细胞浸润分析。 (A) 为周围外膜弹性酶孵育诱导的AAA scRNA-seq数据集 (GSE152583)绘制的t-SNE图，其中包含第7天弹性酶诱导的AAA样品和对照主动脉。 (B) 为CaCl2诱导的AAA scRNA-seq数据集的t-SNE图 (GSE164678)，其中包含CaCl2诱导的AAA样品和对照主动脉在第4天。
翻译：（A ）FOS （B） IL6（ C） PTGS2 （D） SOCS3 在血管中各个细胞之间的表达
(A) FOS，(B) IL6，(C) PTGS2，(D) SOCS3在血管各个细胞之间的表达。
翻译成英文：(A) FOS，(B) IL6，© PTGS2，(D) SOCS3在血管各个细胞之间的表达。
(A) FOS, (B) IL6, (C) PTGS2, and (D) SOCS3 expression among various cells in blood vessels.
翻译：从GEO数据库中下载GSE47472数据集
Download the GSE47472 dataset from the GEO database.
ROC曲线构建预测诊断模型
Constructing a predictive diagnostic model using ROC curve.
起一个腹主动脉瘤SCI生信文章题目
"The Unveiling of the Molecular Landscape and Prognostic Markers of Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm through Systems Biology Approaches."
翻译：SOCS3,IL6,PTGS2, FOS在腹主动脉瘤发生发展中的生物信息学分析
Bioinformatics analysis of SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, and FOS in the occurrence and development of abdominal aortic aneurysm.
